name: Ridge
description: Mountain silhouettes at dusk, suns hanging low between the peaks — each redraw slides every summit and re-hangs the light.

code.style: --rock: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --apex: @rand(20%, 80%); --rise: @rand(4%, 56%); --sunx: @rand(18%, 68%); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -6%; right: -6%; top: 0; bottom: 0; background: var(--rock); clip-path: polygon(var(--apex) var(--rise), 112% 100%, -12% 100%); opacity: 0.85; transition: ease 700ms; } } @random(0.12) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 16%; left: var(--sunx); top: 10%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color5); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
